Thank you for the offer, but I can’t move forward at 6.74 per unit. That level is far outside the economics I need to maintain on the buy side, so there isn’t a workable basis for agreement from my position right now. If you’re able to revisit pricing materially closer to competitive procurement levels, I’d be open to continuing the discussion.
